reviews.review_description: I have actually been using it to sleep, cave and thunderstorm my choices, I literally fall asleep quite quick! So very happy with this cheap app, I hope they add more places, maybe a camping/shelter by a lake or in a forest or something...even if they make these scenarios with a little cost I might be willing to pay. I hope they keep developing the app and don't stop here

.... the implementation needs much more polish. because the app is relativly cheap and for some instances useful, even in its unplished state, i leave four stars, sadly the app is far away from its full potential.
